overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a blue-haired character navigating dark industrial back alleys at night. The character interacts with an injured NPC, engages in combat with a hostile figure, and traverses through narrow passages with shipping containers and graffiti-covered walls before exiting to a main street.

moving past the NPC and continuing down the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial alley at night, illuminated by harsh security lights. The player character approaches an injured NPC kneeling near a metal roll-up door. After a brief interaction, the character moves past stacked pallets and continues deeper into the alley beneath overhead metal walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service passage with scattered debris

events.description: passing a deceased person lying on the ground against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley, passing a body on the ground

entered.detail: scattered garbage and discarded items along the alley wall
metal bridge or walkway spanning the alley in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a dimly lit narrow passage with asphalt ground. The overhead walkway shifts to the left as the character advances. The scene features scattered trash and debris along the walls, with a deceased person lying on the ground near the wall. The alley opens slightly ahead toward a distant bridge structure.

events.description: engaging in hand-to-hand combat with a hostile NPC
defeating the hostile NPC who falls to the ground

agents.ego_description: fighting a hostile character in the industrial courtyard, knocking them to the ground

notable_agents.action: hostile character approaching aggressively then being knocked down in combat

entered.detail: large white shipping container with cargo markings
multi-story concrete industrial building with illuminated windows
large industrial pipes running along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a slightly wider industrial courtyard with warm yellow lighting. The character confronts a hostile NPC near a white shipping container. After a brief combat encounter, the opponent falls to the ground. The area features tall industrial buildings with overhead piping and stacked cargo containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial passage with graffiti walls leading to street exit

events.description: moving from container area into narrow graffiti-covered passage
approaching the metal gate exit leading to the main street
emerging from dark alley into the brighter lit city street

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages with graffiti, passing industrial machinery, and exiting to the main street

entered.detail: blue shipping container with open doors revealing cargo inside
yellow metal platforms and industrial equipment against the wall
brick wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
black metal bar gate marking the exit to the main street
tall city buildings with illuminated windows visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses a narrow industrial passage featuring a blue shipping container with an open door and a body lying nearby. The character moves past yellow industrial machinery and walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Approaching a metal bar gate, the scene transitions from the dark enclosed alley to a brighter city street with parked cars and neon-lit buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, claustrophobic industrial alleyway that gradually opens into a bright, neon-lit city street. It begins under harsh security lights as the character interacts with an injured NPC by a metal door, moving deeper into the shadows beneath overhead metal walkways and past scattered debris. As the path narrows further, the camera glides past a deceased figure on the asphalt before the space expands into a wider courtyard bathed in warm yellow light. The scene then shifts through a brief combat encounter near white shipping containers and overhead piping, continuing past vibrant graffiti and yellow machinery. Finally, the camera passes through a metal bar gate, transitioning from the enclosed industrial gloom to the open expanse of a city street filled with parked cars and distant glowing buildings.
